events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1097. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic, cardiovascular. Allergies: shellfish. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Italian; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: full. 5 meals/week, zone SoMa.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Chicken Pasta Primavera
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 63 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Mushroom Risotto
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 65 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Tuscan White Bean Soup
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 413/700 mg ✓, carbs 53 g (target 40–55) ✓, no shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Grilled Chicken with Creamy Polenta
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 445/700 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 40–55) ✓, no shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Minestrone with Whole-Grain Roll
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 462/700 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–55) ✓, no shellfish ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1097 added to route R-SOMA-1 (SoMa), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1097: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
